mapper.select:
SELECT distinct evt_svc_nm
FROM xeus.mon_evet_hist
WHERE test_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY evt_svc_nm

SELECT evt_nm, count(evt_nm) AS evt_cnt FROM xeus.mon_evet_hist
test_yn = 'Y' AND evt_nm IS NOT NULL AND lower(evt_nm) != 'null' AND evt_nm != ''
AND evt_nm IN (${evtNm})
GROUP BY evt_nm ORDER BY evt_cnt DESC
SELECT grp_cde, grp_nm, cde_cde, cde_nm FROM xeus.mt_cmm_cde WHERE grp_cde = 'C72'
